title: Quantum Dot Size-Effect Dataset
description: Schema for pinned quantum-dot size-dependent property datasets in the Quantum Size Effects campaign. Absorption peak, emission peak, and bandgap values must use distinct property_kind values and must not be mixed under a single residual axis.

status.description: draft: under construction; curated: reviewed and usable for benchmarks; frozen: locked for holdout use.

source_policy.description: Human-readable summary of provenance, pinning, and redistribution policy for this dataset file.

property_kind_covered.description: The single property kind targeted by this dataset file. A file must cover only one property kind to prevent residual mixing.

entry_id.description: Unique entry identifier within this dataset file.

material.description: Canonical chemical symbol or formula, e.g. CdSe, InP, PbS, CdS, ZnSe.

composition_note.description: Alloy fraction, doping, or shell details when relevant. Optional.

diameter_nm.description: Particle diameter in nanometres. Use this or radius_nm, not both.

radius_nm.description: Particle radius in nanometres. Use this or diameter_nm, not both.

property_kind.description: Explicit property semantic. Must not be mixed across entries used in the same residual computation.

value_eV.description: Measured or source-reported energy value in electron-volts.

uncertainty_eV.description: Measurement uncertainty in eV as reported by the source. Optional.

temperature_K.description: Measurement temperature in Kelvin if reported. Optional.

measurement_type.description: Measurement or derivation method. Optional but encouraged.

source_id.description: Must match a source_id registered in data/quantum_dots/source_manifest.yaml.

source_table_ref.description: Specific table, figure, or row reference within the source. Optional but encouraged.

inclusion_status.description: Whether this entry participates in benchmark computations.

exclusion_reason.description: Required when inclusion_status is excluded. Explains why the entry is excluded.

notes.description: Any additional provenance, conversion, or interpretation notes. Optional.
